stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background.
constituency: She is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership.
substantive: She supports increased funding for the NHS.
justification: In political debates, she regularly emphasises the benefits of her political positions for people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background. She is from a constituency that is not your constituency. She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership. She supports increased funding for the NHS. In political debates, she regularly emphasises the benefits of her political positions for people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
